title: LLM output not visible in Google Colab
symptom: The response from the n8n workflow shows '<Response [200]>' instead of the expected JSON output from the AI Agent.
applies_when: Using Google Colab to call n8n webhook
not_this_if: The AI Agent is not configured correctly
root_cause: The user is printing the response object directly, which only shows the HTTP status code. To see the actual JSON output from the AI Agent, the response needs to be parsed correctly.
fix_steps: Change the print statement to 'print(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=2))'
Alternatively, use 'print(response.json())' to directly print the JSON output.
agent_instruction: Modify the print statement in your Google Colab code to display the AI output correctly.
